lines.english: Dwell on the Naam, and realize the Beauteous Word of His Bani.
Through the Shabad, the Word of the True Guru, the Path is known.
With the Guru's Support, one is blessed with the strength of the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਜਲੁ ਡੂੰਗਰੁ ਨ ਊਚੀ ਧਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: naa jal ddoongar na aoochee dhaar |
lines.english: There is no ocean of water, no mountain ranges rising up.
Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, I take the Naam as my Suppport.
If it is Your Will, Lord, You lead me to find Your Door. ||2||
Flying high or sitting down, I am lovingly focused on the One Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਘਰਿ ਵਸਹਿ ਤੂਹੈ ਬਿਧਿ ਜਾਣਹਿ ਬੀਜਉ ਮਹਲੁ ਨ ਜਾਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: jit ghar vaseh toohai bidh jaaneh beejau mehal na jaapai |
lines.english: You alone know the way to that House in which You dwell. No one else knows the Mansion of Your Presence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਵਾਸਾ ਤਹ ਮਗੁ ਨ ਚਾਲਣਹਾਰ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: nij ghar vaasaa teh mag na chaalanahaar |3|
lines.english: I dwell within the home of my own inner being, where there is no path and no one travelling on it. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਬਾਝਹੁ ਸਮਝ ਨ ਹੋਵੀ ਸਭੁ ਜਗੁ ਦਬਿਆ ਛਾਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: satigur baajhahu samajh na hovee sabh jag dabiaa chhaapai |
lines.english: Without the True Guru, there is no understanding. The whole world is buried under its nightmare.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਣ ਪਲਾਵ ਕਰੈ ਬਿਲਲਾਤਉ ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਜਾਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: karan palaav karai bilalaatau bin gur naam na jaapai |
lines.english: The mortal tries all sorts of things, and weeps and wails, but without the Guru, he does not know the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਲ ਪੰਕਜ ਮਹਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਛਡਾਏ ਜੇ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੁ ਸਿਞਾਪੈ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: pal pankaj meh naam chhaddaae je gurasabad siyaapai |4|
lines.english: In the twinkling of an eye, the Naam saves him, if he realizes the Word of the Guru's Shabad. ||4||
Some are foolish, blind, stupid and ignorant.
The True Word of His Bani is sweet, the source of ambrosial nectar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਭੈ ਨਾਮ ਅਧਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: eik satigur kai bhai naam adhaar |
lines.english: Some, through fear of the True Guru, take the Support of the Naam.
Whoever drinks it in, finds the Door of Salvation. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇੰਦੁ ਵਰਸੈ ਧਰਤਿ ਸੁਹਾਵੀ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਸਮਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: eind varasai dharat suhaavee ghatt ghatt jot samaanee |
lines.english: When the clouds release their rain, the earth becomes beautiful; God's Light permeates each and every heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਭੈ ਭਾਇ ਰਿਦੈ ਵਸਾਹੀ ਗੁਰ ਕਰਣੀ ਸਚੁ ਬਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: naam bhai bhaae ridai vasaahee gur karanee sach baanee |
lines.english: One who, through the love and fear of God, enshrines the Naam within his heart, acts according to the Guru's Instructions and knows the True Bani.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਲਰਿ ਬੀਜਸਿ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਐਸੀ ਨਿਗੁਰੇ ਕੀ ਨੀਸਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: kaalar beejas duramat aisee nigure kee neesaanee |
lines.english: The evil-minded ones plant their seed in the barren soil; such is the sign of those who have no Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਬਾਝਹੁ ਘੋਰ ਅੰਧਾਰਾ ਡੂਬਿ ਮੁਏ ਬਿਨੁ ਪਾਣੀ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: satigur baajhahu ghor andhaaraa ddoob mue bin paanee |6|
lines.english: Without the True Guru, there is utter darkness; they drown there, even without water. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕੀਨੋ ਸੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਰਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jo kichh keeno su prabhoo rajaae |
lines.english: Whatever God does, is by His Own Will.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਧੁਰਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਸੁ ਮੇਟਣਾ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jo dhur likhiaa su mettanaa na jaae |
lines.english: That which is pre-ordained cannot be erased.
Bound to the Hukam of the Lord's Command, the mortal does his deeds.
Permeated by the One Word of the Shabad, the mortal is immersed in Truth. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਹੁ ਦਿਸਿ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਵਰਤੈ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੇਰਾ ਚਹੁ ਦਿਸਿ ਨਾਮ ਪਤਾਲੰ ॥
lines.translit: chahu dis hukam varatai prabh teraa chahu dis naam pataalan |
lines.english: Your Command, O God, rules in the four directions; Your Name pervades the four corners of the nether regions as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਂਮਣੁ ਮਰਣਾ ਦੀਸੈ ਸਿਰਿ ਊਭੌ ਖੁਧਿਆ ਨਿਦ੍ਰਾ ਕਾਲੰ ॥
lines.translit: jaaman maranaa deesai sir aoobhau khudhiaa nidraa kaalan |
lines.english: Birth and death hang over the heads of all beings, along with hunger, sleep and dying.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਵਰਤੈ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਾਚਾ ਕਰਮਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਬੈਆਲੰ ॥
lines.translit: sabh meh sabad varatai prabh saachaa karam milai baiaalan |
lines.english: The True Word of the Shabad is pervading amongst all. By His Grace, the Eternal One unites us with Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਵੈ ਸਾਚੀ ਨਦਰਿ ਰਸਾਲੰ ॥੮॥੧॥੪॥
lines.translit: naanak naam milai man bhaavai saachee nadar rasaalan |8|1|4|
lines.english: The Naam is pleasing to Nanak's mind; O True Lord, Source of bliss, please bless me with Your Grace. ||8||1||4||
Malaar, First Mehl:
You are sitting on the river-bank; realize the Word of the Guru's Shabad. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਰਣ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਗਤਿ ਸਾਰ ਨ ਜਾਨੈ ॥
lines.translit: maran mukat gat saar na jaanai |
lines.english: You do not understand the nature of death and liberation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਲਖੁ ਨ ਜਾਚਹਿ ਰਿਦੈ ਸਮੑਾਲਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: alakh na jaacheh ridai samaal |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You do not remember in your heart the Unseen Lord God. ||1||Pause||
For your one life, you consume many lives.
You stork! - how were you caught in the net?
When Death seizes you, then you shall regret and repent. ||3||
You have tormented all beings.
You were supposed to swim in the water, but you are drowning in it instead. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਗਲਿ ਫਾਸ ਪੜੀ ਅਤਿ ਭਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: jab gal faas parree at bhaaree |
lines.english: When the heavy noose is placed around your neck,
You enjoy the tastes and flavors, you foolish self-willed manmukh.
you may spread your wings, but you shall not be able to fly. ||4||
In your heart, dwell on the True Word of the Shabad. ||6||
Serving the True Guru, you will shatter the Messenger of Death.
You are trapped. You can only be saved by virtuous conduct, spiritual wisdom and contemplation. ||5||
The Guru's Teachings, the True Word of the Shabad, is excellent and sublime.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਦੁਖ ਆਗੈ ਜਿ ਭੋਗ ਬਿਲਾਸੇ ॥
lines.translit: se dukh aagai ji bhog bilaase |
lines.english: One who is obsessed with enjoying pleasures here, shall suffer in pain hereafter.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਖੈ ਉਰਿ ਧਾਰਿ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: har kaa naam rakhai ur dhaar |7|
lines.english: Keep the Name of the Lord enshrined in your heart. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਨਹੀ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਸਾਚੇ ॥੮॥੨॥੫॥
lines.translit: naanak mukat nahee bin naavai saache |8|2|5|
lines.english: O Nanak, there is no liberation without the True Name. ||8||2||5||
